tree.title: Microservices Architecture
tree.summary: A comprehensive guide to microservices architecture, covering its principles, benefits, and challenges.

children.title: Introduction
children.summary: An overview of the microservices architecture concept and its importance in modern software development.

children.title: Principles
children.summary: The core principles of microservices, including single responsibility, loose coupling, independent deployment, and data ownership.

children.title: Single Responsibility
children.summary: The concept of a service having a single responsibility and how it relates to the overall architecture.

children.title: Loose Coupling
children.summary: How services should be designed to minimize dependencies and improve scalability.

children.title: Benefits
children.summary: The advantages of adopting microservices architecture, including increased scalability, faster development, and improved fault tolerance.

children.title: Scalability
children.summary: How microservices enable services to be scaled independently, improving overall system performance.

children.title: Faster Development
children.summary: The benefits of using microservices for faster development and deployment cycles.
